Error_3702_Text.message: We are unable to access your webcam. If you are using an external webcam, try unplugging it and plugging it in to a different USB port. If you have an internal camera, check your camera settings to ensure the correct camera is selected. When you've completed these steps, refresh the page. If this does not resolve the issue, please contact our live support.
Error_3702_Text.description: System Check. Webcam device ID does not exist.

Error_3702_Html.message: We are unable to access your webcam. If you are using an external webcam, try unplugging it and plugging it in to a different USB port. If you have an internal camera, check your camera settings to ensure the correct camera is selected. When you've completed these steps, refresh the page. If this does not resolve the issue, please contact our live support. (code: 3702)
Error_3702_Html.description: System Check. Webcam device ID does not exist.

If this does not resolve the issue, please contact our live support.

Ext_Description.message: ProctorU Auto - A fully automated proctoring solution brought to you by the global leaders of online proctoring, ProctorU.

Ext_SecurityChecks_Incidents_Create_Text.message: You are not allowed to navigate away from your exam and doing so creates an incident for your institution to review. Please click "OK" to continue with your exam.

Ext_SecurityChecks_Incidents_Restricted_.message: You are not allowed to navigate away from your exam. Doing so for the second time will end your session and send a report.

Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_1_Ti.description: Proctor Free Submission initial modal Title

Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_1_De.message: Ending the session will close your exam and disconnect you from ProctorU
Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_1_De.description: Proctor Free Submission initial modal Description 1

Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_2_De.message: Make sure to submit your exam before ending your session
Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_2_De.description: Proctor Free Submission initial modal Description 2

Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_Canc.description: Proctor Free Submission initial modal cancel button

Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamSubmit_Modal_Subm.description: Proctor Free Submission initial modal submit button

Ext_SecurityChecks_ExamTabExists_Modal_D.message: You are not allowed to open your exam in multiple tabs.

Ext_SecurityChecks_RestartExam_Modal_Des.message: You can not continue your exam without an active connection to ProctorU.

Widget_WelcomeScreen_StartButton_Disable.message: There are no active terms set-up for your Institution which are required for exam setup. Please contact your system administrator to create an active term to set up an exam.

Widget_WelcomeScreen_Description_Text.message: Get started to set the proctoring settings for your exam. If you have previous exam settings, you can choose to import an existing exam.

Prechecks_Tos_Agreement_Content_1_Text.message: I have read and understand the exam rules prior to starting my test with ProctorU

Prechecks_Tos_Agreement_Content_2_Text.message: I agree to the terms set forth in

Prechecks_Tos_Subtitle_Text.message: Select the checkboxes below to agree and continue

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Agreement_1_Te.message: to the recording and monitoring of your exam session through screen capture, system information, and your computer’s camera and microphone.

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Agreement_2_Te.message: that you consent to the use of biometric facial recognition and/or keystroke analysis to support identity verification (if your testing organization/institution has activated one or both of these features).

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Agreement_3_Ht.message: that you have reviewed and consent to ProctorU’s Privacy Policy

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Agreement_4_Ht.message: that you have reviewed and consent to ProctorU’s Terms of Service

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Content_1_Text.message: ProctorU will record your exam session for review. Recording will begin once you select the "Begin Recording and Continue" button below.

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Content_2_Text.message: By selecting the "Begin Recording and Continue" button below, you agree;

Prechecks_RecordingNotice_Sub_Content_Te.message: You must close both the LogMeInRescue application (if used) and your browser to end the recording of your exam session. Recording will continue until BOTH actions are completed.
